narrative:
Williamsburg Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 929 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.0 percentage points.
